title: hieracium transiens subsp. aculeatissimum
intro: Hieracium transiens subsp. aculeatissimum, also known as hawkweed, is a plant species within the dandelion-like Asteraceae family, characterized by its yellow flowers and prickly leaves. The medicinal properties of Hieracium transiens subsp. aculeatissimum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of the plant are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Hieracium transiens subsp. aculeatissimum include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used to treat various ailments, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using the plant medicinally.
